creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update powerarchitect port from 0.9.12 to 1.0.6 version

# cd /usr/ports/databases/powerarchitect
# patch -p1 < pathToPatch.diff
# rm *.orig files/*.orig

NOTE: it depends on new port databases/jdbc-oracle10g. See

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166243

Best regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
